info.name: Bali Resik API
info.description:
Complete API test collection for Bali Resik - Multi-tenant E-Government waste management platform

## Setup
1. Import collection + environment into Postman
2. Ensure server is running on {{base_url}}
3. Run collection (suggested order) or individual folders

## Auth Flow
- `1_Auth/Login Super Admin` saves tokens automatically
- All subsequent requests use `{{access_token}}` from the collection variables
- Chained IDs (`pickup_id`, `report_id`, etc.) are extracted from create responses

body.raw:
{
  "waste_type": "organic",
  "latitude": -8.6500,
  "longitude": 115.2167,
  "address": "Jl. Raya Puputan No. 1, Denpasar",
  "notes": "Test pickup request"
}

exec: pm.test('Has title', () => pm.response.json().data.title === 'Cara Memilah Sampah Rumah Tangga');
